ball_event: out Caught by Rishabh Pant!! An ugly swipe and Nissanka's uneasy stay in the middle ends. On a good length and just outside off - the length wasn't full enough
event_info: but Nissanka backs himself on the slog; gets a thick top-edge that went straight up and behind the keeper - was always Rishabh Pant's catch; he called for it; ran back; kept his eyes on the ball and completes a fine catch under the lights. LSG have been very good with the ball and they're making it talk. Pathum Nissanka c Rishabh Pant b Prince Yadav 1(5);
